title: polyanthemum aestivale
intro: Polyanthesm aestivale, also known as the summer marigold, is a type of flowering plant in the aster family. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Polyanthemum aestivale include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and even help to lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Polyanthemum aestivale can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
